title: Frontend MVP implementation draft slices
releaseGate: Planning draft only. Do not publish, promote, create OpenClaw tasks, or start AI implementation until TODO-07 is completed, the final pre-code alignment explicitly approves implementation, and the frontend topic discussion freezes the first implementation slice.

stories.title: Scaffold Program routes and workbench shell
stories.scope: Implement the first frontend shell slice for the generic AI autodev platform: `/programs`, `/programs/:programId`, the shared workbench header, and the left-center-right layout skeleton without AI assist, editing, publish, or runtime controls.
stories.nonGoals: Do not implement AI optimization, light edit drawers, OpenClaw controls, model/profile management, or any backend mutations.
acceptance: The route structure matches `/programs` and `/programs/:programId` with query-driven docs/batch mode switching.
The shell renders a stable header, navigation area, main content area, and decision rail placeholder.
No AI assist, light edit, publish, or runtime control affordance is included in this slice.
validation: Final validation command is pending the frontend project root and toolchain freeze.
The implementation must stay aligned with `frontend-workbench-decision.md` and `frontend-page-structure.md`.
notes: Draft only. The target frontend directory and toolchain are not frozen yet.

stories.title: Build Program list page with filters, table, and summary rail
stories.scope: Implement the Program homepage using the approved shell: filter panel, program table, phase/status indicators, and summary rail based on read-only program overview data.
stories.nonGoals: Do not add create/edit/delete flows, model/profile entry points, or dashboard-style decorative metrics.
acceptance: The page follows the `Filter Panel + Program Table + Summary Rail` structure.
Program rows expose current phase, docs status, batch status, readiness summary, and updated time.
The page is clearly read-only and operational, not a marketing or dashboard surface.
validation: Final validation command is pending the frontend project root and toolchain freeze.
The page must reflect the P0 scenarios in `test-matrix.md`.

stories.title: Implement Program workbench navigation tree and docs mode
stories.scope: Implement the Program workbench navigation tree, docs mode state sync, document meta bar, markdown viewer, pending items panel, and related batch links.
stories.nonGoals: Do not implement document editing, AI assist, or independent document sub-routes.
acceptance: Docs mode renders document content, status, updatedAt, pending items, and related batch links.
Navigation between document types stays within the workbench route and preserves query state.
The implementation keeps the workbench as one product surface, not a set of disconnected document pages.
validation: Final validation command is pending the frontend project root and toolchain freeze.
The implementation must stay aligned with `candidate-04-prototype-list.md` and `frontend-page-structure.md`.

stories.title: Implement batch mode and decision rail
stories.scope: Implement batch mode, including batch meta bar, story table, stop conditions, publish blockers, and the right-side readiness decision rail with current phase, ready/not-ready, blockers, profile summary, incident summary, and next action.
stories.nonGoals: Do not add publish buttons, runtime control buttons, graph-based dependency visualization, or mutation actions.
acceptance: Batch mode shows batch state, execution mode, release gate, story table, and stop conditions.
The decision rail makes blockers, profile/incident read-only summary, and next action visible without hiding uncertainty.
Story dependencies are rendered using table/text/tag patterns in the first slice, not a graph.
validation: Final validation command is pending the frontend project root and toolchain freeze.
The implementation must reflect `ready/not-ready` and blocker semantics from `workstreams/03-e2e-critical-flows.md`.

stories.title: Run planning-shell frontend smoke and evidence pass
stories.scope: Run the first frontend smoke pass for the planning shell: Program homepage, Program workbench, docs mode, batch mode, and decision rail, and write compact evidence against the planning test matrix.
stories.nonGoals: Do not broaden into AI assist, light editing, OpenClaw publish, or backend runtime control validation.
acceptance: The smoke scope covers the P0 frontend planning shell scenarios from `test-matrix.md`.
Evidence states whether the workbench keeps `program -> docs -> batch` as one stable flow.
Any blocker is recorded as a blocker, not hidden behind partial success language.
validation: Final validation command is pending the frontend project root and toolchain freeze.
The smoke structure should be reusable later in `workstreams/05-regression-suite.md`.

evidencePolicy.notes: This package is only an implementation draft. It is not an approved automation batch and cannot be used to trigger OpenClaw or any AI worker.

stopConditions: the final pre-code alignment has not approved implementation
the frontend topic discussion has not frozen the first implementation slice
the frontend project root or toolchain is still unfrozen
someone attempts to attach targetTaskIds or publish this batch before final pre-code approval
